title: Bridge Essay: Psychedelia: The interplay of music and psychedelics.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nonordinary — psychedelic decoupling, ego dissolution, DMN disruption, altered states.

**Psychedelia: The interplay of music and psychedelics.**. Ann N Y Acad Sci.. PMID: 37983198. DOI: 10.1111/nyas.15082. Music and psychedelics have been intertwined throughout the existence of Homo sapiens, from the early shamanic rituals of the Americas and Africa to the modern use of psychedelic-assisted therapy for avariety of mental health conditions. Across such settings, music has been highly prized for its ability to guide the psychedelic experience.
